description: Create a forensic case named 'Evidence_Intake_2024' (Case #INV-INT-006) in /home/ga/Cases/ using the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Process the image using the 'File Type Identification' and 'Hash Lookup' ingest modules. Generate a structured evidence intake report at /home/ga/Reports/intake_report.txt containing these exact section headers followed by their values: 'IMAGE_FILENAME:', 'IMAGE_MD5:' (of the .dd file itself), 'IMAGE_SIZE_BYTES:', 'FILE_SYSTEM_TYPE:', 'TOTAL_FILES:', 'TOTAL_DIRECTORIES:', 'ALLOCATED_FILES:', and 'DELETED_FILES:' (exclude directories from file counts). Additionally, export a pipe-delimited file inventory to /home/ga/Reports/file_inventory.csv with the header 'FILENAME|FULL_PATH|SIZE_BYTES|IS_ALLOCATED|IS_DIRECTORY'.
